query: The save toast says it failed but the record actually persisted. Open the app in the browser and figure out what's really happening.
note: Classic 'toast says failed but it saved' symptom needing live-browser network/console evidence.

query: Reproduce this bug in a real browser as the logged-in user and capture the failing request and response.
note: Drive page as signed-in user + capture failing request/response = the core method.

query: Clicking the Download button 404s on staging — can you reproduce it and grab the network trace?
note: 'A click 404s' is a listed symptom; reproduce + capture network = browser-diagnosis.

query: The revenue column shows zero in the dashboard but the data is there. Inspect the actual API response in the browser.
note: 'A column shows zero' symptom; needs the real API response from a live browser.

query: Use whatever browser MCP is connected to root-cause why the upload silently fails.
note: MCP-agnostic live root-cause of a front-end symptom = browser-diagnosis.

query: Mock the orders endpoint response so we can tell whether the bug is the API or the rendering.
note: Shim/mock to isolate API-vs-render is step 3 of the method.

query: Drive the page with Playwright, watch the console, and record a repro GIF of the checkout error.
note: Playwright is one of the supported MCPs; reproduce + watch console + record repro = this skill.

query: Something's off when I submit the form — log every outbound fetch the client makes and show me the payload.
note: Fetch/XHR shim to see what the client actually sent = step 2 of the method.

query: Reproduce the failing GraphQL mutation in the browser and capture the operation name and variables it sent.
note: Live repro + capture GraphQL operation/variables = browser-diagnosis evidence gathering.

query: File a bug for the broken Download button with a full browser repro and attach it to a GitHub issue.
note: Filing an issue WITH a browser repro is the /gh-issue-use-browser command, not the bare skill.

query: Open a Jira ticket for this 404, pinning the repro to the Chrome MCP.
note: Issue-filing with an engine-pinned browser repro = the /jira-issue-use-chrome command.

query: Run the diagnostician agent to dig into the AWS logs and the browser for this full-stack failure.
note: Explicitly the diagnostician agent doing browser + read-only AWS; the skill is what it loads, not what's invoked here.

query: Write me a Playwright e2e test suite that covers the checkout flow.
note: Authoring an automated test suite, not reproducing/root-causing a live symptom — keyword overlap only.

query: Review the diff on this PR for correctness bugs in the front-end code.
note: Static PR diff review, not live-browser evidence capture.

query: Audit this page for accessibility issues — check ARIA labels, focus order, and color contrast.
note: a11y audit in the browser, a different skill — not reproducing a functional bug.

query: Run a Lighthouse performance trace and tell me why the LCP is slow.
note: Performance/LCP profiling, not reproducing a functional front-end fault.

query: Grep the codebase to find where the save handler swallows the error and returns a fake failure toast.
note: Code-only investigation by grepping source, explicitly not the live-browser approach.

query: Take a screenshot of the marketing homepage so I can drop it in a slide deck.
note: Plain browser screenshot for content reuse, no bug to reproduce or root-cause.

query: Plan the migration of our payment provider and lay out the rollout steps.
note: Truly unrelated — migration planning, no browser symptom at all.
